violations.text: Sausage was observed held at 48 degrees Fahrenheit above the fill line in the prep unit; a plate of sausage was observed held at 64 degrees and placed over the fill line in prep unit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Staff placed sausage above fill line in alternate refrigeration, plate of sausage was placed in refrigerator to rapidly cool. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/20/2025

Working containers of water, oil, and sauces are not labeled with the common name of the food. Working containers holding food or food ingredients that are removed from their original packages, such as flour, herbs, salt, sugar, and spices must be labeled with the common name of the food. New Violation. Correct By: 06/03/2025

The non-food contact surfaces of the following have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris: -under grill tops -bottom shelving of prep units -rack under table. New Violation. Correct By: 06/03/2025
Trash and leaf debris was observed in the shared refuse receptacle area. Refuse areas shall be maintained free of debris to prevent harborage conditions. New Violation. Correct By: 06/03/2025
